message:
test(fcp-mesh): expand mesh test suite (+103 tests)

Coverage across admission control, degraded transport, planner,
replay traces, sessions, symbol requests, and transport paths.

- fcp-mesh: 618→721 (+103) — admission errors, degraded decoder,
  lease planning, replay diff/summary, session rekey, transport ranking

All clippy clean with -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
